introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中表示的个体数或基因拷贝数。

introduced_concepts.name: Recombination Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: The rate at which recombination separates linked loci.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 重组率表示连锁位点被重组分开的速率，决定中性位点逃离选择扫荡影响的机会。

introduced_concepts.name: Selection Coefficient
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter measuring the strength of selection.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量选择强度的参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Baseline Heterozygosity
introduced_concepts.definition: The reference heterozygosity level used before or without the sweep effect.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 作为参照的杂合度水平，通常表示没有扫荡影响或扫荡前的遗传多样性。

introduced_concepts.name: Baseline Recombination Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: The reference recombination rate used to scale linked-site effects.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 基准重组率用于给连锁位点效应定尺度，常作为比较遗传多样性下降幅度的参照。
